The '''''M'hendosat''''' was a [[Predator-class warship|''Predator''-class warship]] under the command of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kassihm]]. It was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 14: The Monsters of Dweem]]''
